title: Supply and workflows workbench rollout
releaseGate: Publish only after batch-001 evidence confirms the shared workbench rhythm is stable.

stories.title: Convert supply page into a list-form-import workbench
stories.scope: Restructure `/business/supply` so product list, selected product editor, and import result handling follow one compact workbench flow without losing template download, problem export, or import confirmation behavior.
stories.nonGoals: Do not change supply import file format or backend save semantics.
acceptance: Supply page clearly prioritizes the product list and selected-item editing flow.
Import preview and result areas are visible but secondary.
Template download and problem-row export remain available.

stories.title: Reframe workflows page around archive queue operations
stories.scope: Refocus `/business/workflows` on archive-ready contracts, flow status, and archive batch navigation so the page behaves like a queue-driven workflow workbench rather than a summary dashboard.
stories.nonGoals: Do not redesign contract archive business logic or add new flow nodes.
acceptance: Workflow page prioritizes queue and actionable contract objects.
Archive-ready focus from message center remains functional.
Contract-center and archive-ledger links remain accessible.
